headline: Akamai Launches Brand Guardian to Help Enterprises Combat Automated Fraud
summary: AI-powered solution identifies and disrupts brand impersonation across the web, social media, email, app stores, and the dark web to protect customer trust and revenueCAMBRIDGE, Mass., March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) today introduced Akamai Brand Guardian. This evolution of Akamai Brand Protector adds proactive, AI-powered capabilities that can help global enterprises identify and manage brand impersonation at scale.
